pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Downgrade Spring Boot parent version from 3.4.4 to 3.2.3.
Comment out the explicit Lombok version to rely on the Spring Boot managed version.
Add Spring Boot Starter Data JPA dependency for ORM support.
Add Spring Boot Starter Security dependency for authentication/authorization.
Add Spring Boot Starter Validation dependency for bean validation.
Add JJWT API dependency for JWT handling.
Add JJWT Implementation dependency for JWT handling.
Add JJWT Jackson dependency for JWT JSON processing.

Change the date field type from java.sql.Date to String to simplify data handling or serialization.
Add a status field to the ReservaEntity model to track reservation state.
Refactor database connection handling to store the connection object and pass it to the disconnect method.

src/main/java/co/edu/unicauca/distribuid.why_exists: The controller methods previously returned or accepted ReservaEntity, which is now replaced by ReservaDTORespuesta and ReservaDTOPeticion; without updating the method signatures and return types, the code will fail to compile due to type mismatches.
